    G

    Galleon - Class in battleship
    The type Galleon represents a ship with a size of 5 units.

    Constructs a new game instance with the player's fleet.

    Utility class responsible for generating a PDF report at the end of a Battleship game.

    GameTimer - Class in battleship
    Utility class responsible for measuring real-time durations during the game.

    generate(Game, String) - Static method in class battleship.GameReportPDF
    Generates a PDF report for the given completed game and saves it to the data/ directory.
